headline: Morgan Stanley (MS) Buys Into UK Rentals With £1.045b Metra Living Deal
summary: Morgan Stanley Investment Management and Ridgeback Group agreed to acquire Metra Living, the PRS business of London & Quadrant Housing Trust, for £1.045b. The deal expands NYSE:MS into UK residential rental assets at a time of housing supply constraints in key urban areas. Morgan Stanley is also playing a major role in a multibillion dollar bond refinancing for SpaceX following its historic IPO. For investors tracking Morgan Stanley, these moves highlight how NYSE:MS uses its asset...

headline: SpaceX Bankers Prepare for Bond Sale of at Least $20 Billion
